title: Robin’s Warning
description: Chopper reports what Robin said, while the attack on Iceburg and Robin’s actions push the Straw Hats deeper into Water Seven’s conspiracy.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci, Franky. Chopper reports what Robin said, while the attack on Iceburg and Robin’s actions push the Straw Hats deeper into Water Seven’s conspiracy.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: If someone wants to make matters worse...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: The successful assessi- nation of the Mayor

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: I'm just talking about the possibil- ities.

dialogue.text: Whether to believe it or not...

dialogue.text: Did he do something to Nico Robin!?
